title: Cherry-pick PR #782: Fix regex in the chess.com link import
description: The chess.com game import regex requires /live/ or /daily/ in the URL path, but chess.com sometimes omits this segment in post-game URLs (e.g. chess.com/game/12345). The fix makes the live/daily segment optional and defaults to 'live' when absent.
notes: 2-line change in one file — minimal risk
Also change: match[1] fallback to 'live' when group is undefined

in_scope: Update regex in getChesscomGame to make live/daily optional
Default gameType to 'live' when the URL segment is absent

requirements: URLs with /game/12345 now work (new behavior, defaults to live)
edge_cases: URL with no game ID should still return null

acceptance_gates: Regex matches all 3 URL formats correctly

manual: In running app: paste a chess.com URL like https://www.chess.com/game/12345 (no live/daily) and verify it loads
Paste https://www.chess.com/game/live/12345 and verify it still works
Paste https://www.chess.com/game/daily/12345 and verify it still works

done_criteria: Regex updated to make live/daily optional
gameType defaults to 'live' when segment absent
